case_title: RICHARD ANILAO VS. NEW CINGULAR WIRELESS PCS, LLC. @ 1 POWELL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-19-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEW CINGULAR WIRELESS PCS, LLC. @ 1 POWELL
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ANILAO, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT NEW CINGULAR WIRELESS PCS, LLC. @ 1 POWELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FILED NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION. FILED BY DEFENDANT NEW CINGULAR WIRELESS PCS, LLC. @ 1 POWELL AS TO PLAINTIFF ANILAO, RICHARD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT NEW CINGULAR WIRELESS PCS, LLC. @ 1 POWELL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANILAO, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT NEW CINGULAR WIRELESS PCS, LLC. @ 1 POWELL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-25-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RICHARD ANILAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CINGULAR WIRELESS PCS, LLC. @ 1 POWELL IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BRITTANY SMMERHILL, ASSISTANT MANAGER. THE PARTIES WERE ASSISTED BY THE MEDIATORS IN A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DUE TO THE REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES AT THE MARCH 2019 HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
